_publications._publicationTitle: Antisense oligonucleotides targeting exon 11 are able to partially rescue the NF2-related schwannomatosis phenotype

_contextSnippet: To verify that the induced skipping of exons 4 or 8 caused a decrease in Merlin levels rather than a lack of immunoreactivity, the exon-less NF2 cDNAs were cloned to an N-terminal FLAG tag expression vector and transfected to HeLa cells
details: Used to verify that induced skipping of exons 4 or 8 caused decrease in Merlin levels rather than lack of immunoreactivity by transfecting exon-less NF2 cDNAs with N-terminal FLAG tag
